message:
🌱 Add kubevirt: copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes. mission (#922)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevirt-3638-copy-on-write-volumes-as-delta-for-read-only-volumes",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevirt: copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.",
+    "description": "copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevirt deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your virtctl version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nhelm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kubevirt installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevirt configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt\n```\nThe feature request here is to facilitate copy on write backing volumes for read-only volumes."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.",
+        "description": "WIP. lets come to an agreement on the API, then I'll lock this down with func/unit tests. \n\nThis PR adds a new, `CopyOnWrite`, field to ContainerDisks which makes it possible for ContainerDisks to be used with persistence across restarts. The API is structured in a way that allows expanding (in the\n```yaml\nvolumes:\n  - containerDisk:\n      image: kubevirt/fedora-cloud-container-disk-demo:devel\n      copyOnWrite:\n        persistentVolumeClaim:\n          claimName: my-pvc\n    name: containerdisk\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt\nkubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"copy on write volumes as delta for read only volumes.\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "WIP. lets come to an agreement on the API, then I'll lock this down with func/unit tests. \n\nThis PR adds a new, `CopyOnWrite`, field to ContainerDisks which makes it possible for ContainerDisks to be used with persistence across restarts.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "volumes:\n  - containerDisk:\n      image: kubevirt/fedora-cloud-container-disk-demo:devel\n      copyOnWrite:\n        persistentVolumeClaim:\n          claimName: my-pvc\n    name: containerdisk"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+    ],

+    ],

+    },
